output: Completed batch 2. `TimelineCanvas` now treats `lostpointercapture` as the same resize-finalization path as pointer-up, with a regression proving preview overrides clear, capture is released, pending ops drain, `onActionResizeEnd` fires, and interaction-end listeners run. The type/migration layer is now soft-tag-only on the exported `PinnedShotGroup` shape: legacy `start` and `children` were removed from the type, snapshot bounds gained optional `start`/`end`, `repairConfig()` converts projection-shaped groups to ordered `clipIds` only, and serialization tests assert legacy fields are never re-emitted. Checkpointed progress to `.megaplan/plans/finish-the-projection-model-20260408-1628/execution_batch_2.json`.

task_updates.executor_notes: TimelineCanvas now routes `onLostPointerCapture` through the existing `endResize()` teardown, so the same cleanup path clears overrides, releases capture, decrements pending ops, resets `interactionStateRef.resize`, and notifies idle listeners. Added a lost-capture regression that proves preview width snaps back to committed rows, `onActionResizeEnd` fires with the previewed bounds, and the interaction-end listener runs. Verified with `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` and the combined targeted sweep.

Removed the deprecated `PinnedShotGroup.start` and `PinnedShotGroup.children` fields from the exported type, added optional snapshot `start`/`end` bounds for later image restore work, and kept legacy compatibility contained to `repairConfig()` via a local legacy cast. Migration now rewrites projection-shaped groups to ordered soft-tag `clipIds` only while preserving deep-cloned snapshot data, and serialization tests assert legacy fields are never re-emitted. Verified with `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/lib/migrate.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/lib/serialize.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/lib/render-bounds.validation.test.ts` and the combined targeted sweep.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: The lost-capture regression now fires `lostpointercapture` after an active resize preview and confirms the shared `endResize()` path clears the preview, ends the session, flips `interactionStateRef.resize` back to false, releases capture, decrements pending ops, calls `onActionResizeEnd`, and triggers an idle listener once.

Migration and serialization coverage now loads a projection-shaped pinned group with legacy `start` and `children`, repairs it into ordered `clipIds` only, preserves snapshot bounds, and asserts both repaired and serialized output omit `start` and `children`.
